member.name: M:FinTreX.WebApi.Controllers.AccountController.AuthenticateAsync(FinTreX.Core.DTOs.Account.AuthenticationRequest)
member.summary: Authenticate with email + password → JWT + refresh token.

member.name: M:FinTreX.WebApi.Controllers.AccountController.RegisterAsync(FinTreX.Core.DTOs.Account.RegisterRequest)
member.summary: Register a new user account. Triggers an OTP email and requires subsequent verification.

member.name: M:FinTreX.WebApi.Controllers.AccountController.VerifyEmailAsync(FinTreX.Core.DTOs.Account.VerifyEmailRequest)
member.summary: Verify the 6-digit email OTP and receive a JWT + refresh token.

member.name: M:FinTreX.WebApi.Controllers.AccountController.ResendVerificationCodeAsync(FinTreX.Core.DTOs.Account.ResendVerificationRequest)
member.summary: Resend the 6-digit email verification code (60-second cooldown).

member.name: M:FinTreX.WebApi.Controllers.AccountController.RefreshTokenAsync(FinTreX.Core.DTOs.Account.RefreshTokenRequest)
member.summary: Exchange a refresh token for a new JWT + refresh token pair.

member.name: M:FinTreX.WebApi.Controllers.AccountController.RevokeTokenAsync(FinTreX.Core.DTOs.Account.RefreshTokenRequest)
member.summary: Revoke a refresh token (e.g. on logout).

member.name: M:FinTreX.WebApi.Controllers.AccountController.ForgotPasswordAsync(FinTreX.Core.DTOs.Account.ForgotPasswordRequest)
member.summary: Request a password reset token.

member.name: M:FinTreX.WebApi.Controllers.AccountController.ResetPasswordAsync(FinTreX.Core.DTOs.Account.ResetPasswordRequest)
member.summary: Reset password using a valid reset token.

member.name: T:FinTreX.WebApi.Controllers.BaseApiController
member.summary: Base controller providing common utilities for authenticated API controllers. All controllers that require authentication should inherit from this class.

member.name: P:FinTreX.WebApi.Controllers.BaseApiController.AuthenticatedUserId
member.summary: Returns the authenticated user's Identity ID (from JWT "uid" claim).

member.name: P:FinTreX.WebApi.Controllers.BaseApiController.AuthenticatedUserEmail
member.summary: Returns the authenticated user's email address.

member.name: P:FinTreX.WebApi.Controllers.BaseApiController.AuthenticatedUserRoles
member.summary: Returns the list of role names assigned to the authenticated user.

member.name: P:FinTreX.WebApi.Controllers.BaseApiController.ClientIpAddress
member.summary: Extracts the real client IP from the X-Forwarded-For header or the connection.

member.name: M:FinTreX.WebApi.Controllers.v1.AiAssistantController.Chat(FinTreX.Core.DTOs.AiAssistant.AiChatRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Send a message and get the AI assistant's reply.

member.name: M:FinTreX.WebApi.Controllers.v1.AiAssistantController.ChatStream(FinTreX.Core.DTOs.AiAssistant.AiChatRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Stream the assistant's reply as SSE chunks.

member.name: M:FinTreX.WebApi.Controllers.v1.AiAssistantController.GetConversations
member.summary: List the user's AI conversations.

member.name: M:FinTreX.WebApi.Controllers.v1.AiAssistantController.GetConversation(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get a single conversation with messages.

member.name: M:FinTreX.WebApi.Controllers.v1.AiAssistantController.DeleteConversation(System.Int32)
member.summary: Soft-delete a conversation.

member.name: M:FinTreX.WebApi.Controllers.v1.ChatsController.GetMyConversations
member.summary: Get all conversations for the current user.

member.name: M:FinTreX.WebApi.Controllers.v1.ChatsController.GetConversation(System.Int32)
member.summary: Get a single conversation by ID.

member.name: M:FinTreX.WebApi.Controllers.v1.ChatsController.CreateConversation(FinTreX.Core.DTOs.Chat.CreateConversationRequest)
member.summary: Create a new conversation (User only).

member.name: M:FinTreX.WebApi.Controllers.v1.ChatsController.DeleteConversation(System.Int32)
member.summary: Delete a conversation (soft-delete for current user).

member.name: M:FinTreX.WebApi.Controllers.v1.ChatsController.UpdateTitle(System.Int32,FinTreX.Core.DTOs.Chat.UpdateConversationTitleRequest)
member.summary: Update conversation title.

member.name: M:FinTreX.WebApi.Controllers.v1.ChatsController.GetMessages(System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.Int64},System.Int32)
member.summary: Get messages with cursor-based pagination.

member.name: M:FinTreX.WebApi.Controllers.v1.ChatsController.GetUnreadCount
member.summary: Get total unread message count across all conversations.

member.name: M:FinTreX.WebApi.Controllers.v1.EconomistClientsController.GetAvailableEconomists
member.summary: Returns all users with the Economist role — used by clients when hiring an economist.

member.name: T:FinTreX.WebApi.Controllers.v1.MeController
member.summary: Authenticated-user controller — any logged-in user can access their own profile. Protected by [Authorize] (no specific role required).

member.name: M:FinTreX.WebApi.Controllers.v1.MeController.GetMyProfile
member.summary: Returns the currently authenticated user's profile.

member.name: T:FinTreX.WebApi.Hubs.ChatConnectionTracker
member.summary: Thread-safe in-memory tracker for user connections. Supports multi-tab (multiple connections per user).

member.name: M:FinTreX.WebApi.Hubs.ChatHub.JoinConversation(System.Int32)
member.summary: Join a conversation room to receive real-time messages.

member.name: M:FinTreX.WebApi.Hubs.ChatHub.LeaveConversation(System.Int32)
member.summary: Leave a conversation room.

member.name: M:FinTreX.WebApi.Hubs.ChatHub.SendMessage(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Send a text message to a conversation.

member.name: M:FinTreX.WebApi.Hubs.ChatHub.EditMessage(System.Int64,System.String)
member.summary: Edit an existing message.

member.name: M:FinTreX.WebApi.Hubs.ChatHub.DeleteMessage(System.Int64)
member.summary: Delete a message (soft-delete).

member.name: M:FinTreX.WebApi.Hubs.ChatHub.MarkAsRead(System.Int32,System.Int64)
member.summary: Mark messages up to a certain ID as read.

member.name: M:FinTreX.WebApi.Hubs.ChatHub.NotifyTyping(System.Int32)
member.summary: Notify that the current user is typing in a conversation.

member.name: T:FinTreX.WebApi.Hubs.IChatClient
member.summary: Strongly-typed SignalR client interface for chat events.

member.name: T:FinTreX.WebApi.Hubs.MarketDataSubscriptionTracker
member.summary: Tracks active SignalR subscriptions per connection and cache key.

member.name: T:FinTreX.WebApi.Services.CurrentUserService
member.summary: WebApi implementation of ICurrentUserService using HttpContextAccessor.
